characters.appearance: A South Indian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and a dusky complexion. He has short, curly black hair, a well-groomed beard and mustache, and prominent facial features. He has a friendly and inquisitive expression.
characters.wardrobe: A blue and white vertically striped button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up, paired with light blue jeans. He wears a watch on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Curious, impressed, and engaged in the conversation.

characters.appearance: A South Indian woman in her mid-to-late 20s with a slender build and a fair complexion. She has long, straight black hair parted to the side. Her facial features are soft, and she has a bright, expressive smile.
characters.wardrobe: A green and yellow printed salwar kameez with a sheer, patterned green dupatta draped over her shoulders.
characters.demeanor: Initially polite and slightly reserved, she becomes confident, enthusiastic, and persuasive when talking about her experience.

characters.appearance: A South Indian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a light-to-medium complexion. He has thick, wavy black hair and a short, neat beard. He has a gentle and supportive look.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, short-sleeved white t-shirt and light-colored, possibly cream or off-white, striped trousers.
characters.demeanor: Supportive, encouraging, and proud of his partner.

characters.appearance: A woman in her 30s with a fair complexion, long, dark, wavy hair, and professionally styled makeup. She has a warm, professional smile and appears poised and confident.
characters.wardrobe: A dark navy blue blazer over a white top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Wait, तुम दोनों same college में थे? Tell me the whole story. [Wait, you two were in the same college? Tell me the whole story.]
Character C says: अरे, वो कुछ पूछ रहा है। [Hey, he is asking something.]
Character B says: Actually, it's a funny story. हम अपने parents के through मिले थे, क्योंकि वो long time friends थे। [Actually, it's a funny story. We met through our parents, as they were long time friends.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a casual, friendly setting among peers.
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable social interaction.
- Sets up Character B as the focal point of the story.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

through मिले थे,

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: तुम्हारी English बहुत super है यार। इसने तो कहा था तुम Hindi medium से हो? [Your English is very super man. He said you were from a Hindi medium school?]
Character B says: मैं Hindi medium से ही हूँ। पर उससे मैं रुकी नहीं। [I am from a Hindi medium school. But that didn't stop me.]
Character C says: Where did you learn such good English? [Where did you learn such good English?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core problem: the stigma or barrier of coming from a non-English medium background.
- Highlights Character B's confidence and success.
- Prompts the reveal of the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
तुम्हारी English
Hindi medium
से हो?
मैं Hindi medium
पर उससे मैं
रुकी नहीं।
Where did you learn
such good English?

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Supernova app में, एक AI teacher हैं। उनके साथ रोज़ practice करके ही मैंने English सीखी। [In the Supernova app, there is an AI teacher. I learned English by practicing with her daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reveals Supernova as the solution.
- Highlights the AI teacher feature.
- Emphasizes daily practice as the method for improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Supernova app में,
एक AI teacher हैं।
उनके साथ रोज़ practice करके
मैंने English सीखी।

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: मेरी mistakes पर वो हँसती नहीं, और judge भी नहीं करती। Interview हो या office, अब मैं कहीं भी confident-ly English बोल सकती हूँ। मेरी मानो, तुम भी Supernova app download करो। क्या पता, promotion भी मिल जाए। [She doesn't laugh at my mistakes, and doesn't judge either. Whether it's an interview or office, now I can speak English confidently anywhere. Listen to me, you also download the Supernova app. Who knows, you might even get a promotion.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the fear of judgment when learning a language.
- Connects the app's benefits to real-world outcomes like confidence in interviews and offices.
- Delivers a strong, peer-to-peer recommendation with a tangible career benefit.
